errors.url_required: Paste your YouTube or Twitch stream URL.
errors.no_provider: That URL isn't a YouTube or Twitch link OnAir recognises.

directory.title: Live now
directory.empty: No one is live right now. Be the first — hit “Go live”.

go_live.title: Go live
go_live.success: You're live! Your LIVE badge is now showing.

viewer.unavailable: This stream can't be embedded right now.

stream.end_failed: Couldn't end the stream. Please try again.

settings.default_provider_help: Pre-selected source in the Go Live dialog.
settings.poll_interval_help: How often the fallback transport checks who is live, when flarum/realtime is not installed. Minimum 10.
settings.max_hours_help: Streams still marked live after this many hours are automatically ended by the hourly reaper. Catches streamers who closed their tab without ending.
